instruction:
The area enclosed by the parabola \( y^2 = 2px \) and the normal line at the point \(\left(\frac{p}{2}, p\right)\) is \( \) .

Options:
A. \(\frac{12}{3} p^2\)
B. \(\frac{20}{3} p^2\)
C. \(\frac{14}{3} p^2\)
D. \(\frac{32}{9} p^2\)
E. \(\frac{18}{3} p^2\)
F. \(\frac{16}{3} p^2\)
G. \( rac{4}{3} p^2\)
H. \(\frac{24}{3} p^2\)
I. \( rac{32}{3} p^2\)
